name: Grandfathered Irrevocable Trust Exclusion

eligibility.description: Applies to beneficiaries of trusts that were irrevocable as of 9/25/1985. Taxpayers must ensure no post-1985 additions were made to maintain the exempt status.

description: Generation-skipping transfers from trusts that were irrevocable on or before September 25, 1985, are generally exempt from GST tax, provided no new assets have been added to the corpus.
